# polymarket_events (Data Source)

Lists Polymarket events, optionally filtered by activity, closed state, or slug, with pagination support. Each event embeds its markets.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List up to 10 active, open events with their embedded markets.
data "polymarket_events" "active" {
  active = true
  closed = false
  limit  = 10
}

output "event_titles" {
  value = [for e in data.polymarket_events.active.events : e.title]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) When set, returns only events whose `active` flag matches this value.
- `closed` (Boolean) When set, returns only events whose `closed` flag matches this value.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of events to return. Combine with `offset` to paginate.
- `offset` (Number) Number of events to skip before collecting results, for pagination.
- `slug` (String) When set, returns only the event with this exact URL slug.

### Read-Only

- `events` (Attributes List) List of events matching the supplied filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--events))

<a id="nestedatt--events"></a>
### Nested Schema for `events`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the event is currently active.
- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the event has been archived and hidden from the default UI.
- `closed` (Boolean) Whether the event has closed.
- `comment_count` (Number) Number of user comments posted on the event.
- `created_at` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the event record was created.
- `creation_date` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the event was created.
- `description` (String) Long-form description of the event and how its markets resolve.
- `enable_order_book` (Boolean) Whether a CLOB order book is enabled for the event's markets.
- `end_date` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the event is scheduled to end.
- `featured` (Boolean) Whether the event is featured on Polymarket.
- `icon` (String) URL of the event's icon image.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the event, as assigned by Polymarket.
- `image` (String) URL of the event's banner image.
- `markets` (Attributes List) Markets that make up the event. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--events--markets))
- `neg_risk` (Boolean) Whether the event uses negative-risk (mutually exclusive multi-outcome) settlement across its markets.
- `new` (Boolean) Whether the event is flagged as newly listed.
- `resolution_source` (String) Source of truth consulted to resolve the event's markets, when specified.
- `restricted` (Boolean) Whether the event is geo-restricted or otherwise access-limited.
- `series_slug` (String) Slug of the recurring series this event belongs to, when part of one.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug identifying the event on polymarket.com.
- `start_date` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the event opened.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Category tags attached to the event. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--events--tags))
- `ticker` (String) Short ticker symbol identifying the event.
- `title` (String) Human-readable title of the event.
- `updated_at` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the event record was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--events--markets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `events.markets`

Read-Only:

- `accepting_orders` (Boolean) Whether the market is currently accepting new orders.
- `active` (Boolean) Whether the market is currently active and accepting trades.
- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the market has been archived and hidden from the default UI.
- `best_ask` (Number) Current best (lowest) ask price for the primary outcome, in `[0, 1]`.
- `best_bid` (Number) Current best (highest) bid price for the primary outcome, in `[0, 1]`.
- `clob_token_ids` (List of String) CLOB ERC-1155 token IDs for each outcome, used to query the order book; aligns with `outcomes`.
- `closed` (Boolean) Whether the market has closed and no longer accepts trades.
- `competitive` (Number) Polymarket's competitiveness score for the market, in `[0, 1]`; higher is more liquid/tighter.
- `condition_id` (String) On-chain condition ID (a `0x`-prefixed hash) linking the market to its CTF contract.
- `created_at` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the market record was created.
- `description` (String) Long-form description and resolution criteria explaining how the market settles.
- `enable_order_book` (Boolean) Whether a CLOB order book is enabled for this market.
- `end_date` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the market is scheduled to close.
- `group_item_title` (String) Short label distinguishing this market within its parent event group, when grouped.
- `icon` (String) URL of the market's icon image.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the market, as assigned by Polymarket (for example `253123`).
- `image` (String) URL of the market's banner image.
- `last_trade_price` (Number) Price at which the primary outcome most recently traded, in `[0, 1]`.
- `liquidity` (String) Total liquidity available in the market, in USDC, as a decimal string.
- `order_min_size` (Number) Minimum order size accepted by the order book, in shares.
- `order_price_min_tick_size` (Number) Smallest price increment accepted by the order book (e.g. `0.01`).
- `outcome_prices` (List of String) Current price (implied probability in `[0, 1]`) of each outcome as a decimal string; aligns with `outcomes`.
- `outcomes` (List of String) Ordered list of outcome names, e.g. `["Yes", "No"]`; aligns positionally with `outcome_prices` and `clob_token_ids`.
- `question` (String) Human-readable question the market resolves, e.g. `Will candidate X win?`.
- `question_id` (String) On-chain question ID (a `0x`-prefixed hash) used by the UMA oracle to resolve the market.
- `resolution_source` (String) Source of truth consulted to resolve the market, when specified.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug identifying the market on polymarket.com.
- `spread` (Number) Current bid-ask spread of the market's primary outcome.
- `start_date` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the market opened for trading.
- `updated_at` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the market record was last updated.
- `volume` (String) Cumulative trading volume of the market, in USDC, as a decimal string.
- `volume_1mo` (Number) Trading volume over the trailing month, in USDC.
- `volume_1wk` (Number) Trading volume over the trailing week, in USDC.
- `volume_1yr` (Number) Trading volume over the trailing year, in USDC.
- `volume_24hr` (Number) Trading volume over the trailing 24 hours, in USDC.


<a id="nestedatt--events--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `events.tags`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the tag.
- `label` (String) Human-readable label of the tag.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug of the tag.
